name: Peach Melba (Wedman)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place each peach half in a serving dish.
2. Spoon about 1 tablespoon of yogurt over each peach half.
3. Pour the raspberry puree over the yogurt.
4. Add sugar substitute before serving if the puree needs to be sweetened.
1 serving = 62 calories, 1 fruit exchange, 1 gram protein, 13 grams carbohydrate, 0 fat, 37 mg sodium
Adapted from Quick & Easy Diabetic Menus by Betty Wedman, 1993
Shared but not tested by Elizabeth Rodier, March 94
